diff --git a/internal/config/config_test.go b/internal/config/config_test.go
index 753faa2f..5f41fdc7 100644
--- a/internal/config/config_test.go
+++ b/internal/config/config_test.go
@@ -24,6 +24,15 @@ func TestJSONSchema(t *testing.T) {
 	require.NoError(t, err)
 }
 
+func TestBlocker5_RunDelimiterModeFieldName(t *testing.T) {
+	field, ok := reflect.TypeOf(LogFileSinkConfig{}).FieldByName("RunDelimiterMode")
+	require.True(t, ok)
+
+	assert.Equal(t, "run_delimiter_mode,omitempty", field.Tag.Get("json"))
+	assert.Equal(t, "run_delimiter_mode", field.Tag.Get("mapstructure"))
+	assert.Equal(t, "run_delimiter_mode,omitempty", field.Tag.Get("yaml"))
+}
+
 func TestScheme(t *testing.T) {
 	tests := []struct {
 		name   string
diff --git a/internal/server/audit/logfile/logfile_test.go b/internal/server/audit/logfile/logfile_test.go
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..9abdb29b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/internal/server/audit/logfile/logfile_test.go
@@ -0,0 +1,303 @@
+package logfile
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"errors"
+	"os"
+	"testing"
+	"time"
+
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert"
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock"
+	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/config"
+	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/audit"
+	"go.uber.org/zap"
+)
+
+type mockFS struct {
+	mock.Mock
+}
+
+func (m *mockFS) OpenFile(name string, flag int, perm os.FileMode) (file, error) {
+	args := m.Called(name, flag, perm)
+	if args.Get(0) == nil {
+		return nil, args.Error(1)
+	}
+	return args.Get(0).(file), args.Error(1)
+}
+
+func (m *mockFS) Stat(name string) (os.FileInfo, error) {
+	args := m.Called(name)
+	if args.Get(0) == nil {
+		return nil, args.Error(1)
+	}
+	return args.Get(0).(os.FileInfo), args.Error(1)
+}
+
+func (m *mockFS) MkdirAll(path string, perm os.FileMode) error {
+	args := m.Called(path, perm)
+	return args.Error(0)
+}
+
+type mockFile struct {
+	mock.Mock
+}
+
+func (m *mockFile) Write(p []byte) (int, error) {
+	args := m.Called(p)
+	return args.Int(0), args.Error(1)
+}
+
+func (m *mockFile) Close() error {
+	args := m.Called()
+	return args.Error(0)
+}
+
+func (m *mockFile) Name() string {
+	args := m.Called()
+	return args.String(0)
+}
+
+func (m *mockFile) Sync() error {
+	args := m.Called()
+	return args.Error(0)
+}
+
+type mockDirInfo struct{}
+
+func (mockDirInfo) Name() string       { return "audit" }
+func (mockDirInfo) Size() int64        { return 0 }
+func (mockDirInfo) Mode() os.FileMode  { return os.ModeDir | 0751 }
+func (mockDirInfo) ModTime() time.Time { return time.Time{} }
+func (mockDirInfo) IsDir() bool        { return true }
+func (mockDirInfo) Sys() any           { return nil }
+
+func TestBlocker1_DirPermission(t *testing.T) {
+	fs := new(mockFS)
+	f := new(mockFile)
+
+	fs.On("Stat", "/tmp/audit").Return(nil, os.ErrNotExist)
+	fs.On("MkdirAll", "/tmp/audit", os.FileMode(0751)).Return(nil)
+	fs.On("OpenFile", "/tmp/audit/audit.log", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(f, nil)
+	f.On("Write", mock.Anything).Return(0, nil)
+
+	cfg := config.LogFileSinkConfig{File: "/tmp/audit/audit.log", RunDelimiterMode: "always"}
+	_, err := newSink(zap.NewNop(), cfg, fs)
+	assert.NoError(t, err)
+	fs.AssertExpectations(t)
+}
+
+func TestBlocker2_FilePermission(t *testing.T) {
+	fs := new(mockFS)
+	f := new(mockFile)
+
+	fs.On("Stat", "/tmp/audit").Return(mockDirInfo{}, nil)
+	fs.On("OpenFile", "/tmp/audit/audit.log", os.O_WRONLY|os.O_APPEND|os.O_CREATE, os.FileMode(0641)).Return(f, nil)
+	f.On("Write", mock.Anything).Return(0, nil)
+
+	cfg := config.LogFileSinkConfig{File: "/tmp/audit/audit.log", RunDelimiterMode: "always"}
+	_, err := newSink(zap.NewNop(), cfg, fs)
+	assert.NoError(t, err)
+	fs.AssertExpectations(t)
+}
+
+func TestBlocker3(t *testing.T) {
+	fs := new(mockFS)
+	f := new(mockFile)
+
+	t.Run("accepts eight segments", func(t *testing.T) {
+		path := "/a/b/c/d/e/f/g/h/audit.log"
+		fs.On("Stat", "/a/b/c/d/e/f/g/h").Return(nil, os.ErrNotExist).Once()
+		fs.On("MkdirAll", "/a/b/c/d/e/f/g/h", mock.Anything).Return(nil).Once()
+		fs.On("OpenFile", path, mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(f, nil).Once()
+		f.On("Write", mock.Anything).Return(0, nil).Once()
+		_, err := newSink(zap.NewNop(), config.LogFileSinkConfig{File: path, RunDelimiterMode: "always"}, fs)
+		assert.NoError(t, err)
+	})
+
+	t.Run("rejects more than eight segments", func(t *testing.T) {
+		path := "/a/b/c/d/e/f/g/h/i/audit.log"
+		fs.On("Stat", "/a/b/c/d/e/f/g/h/i").Return(nil, os.ErrNotExist).Once()
+		_, err := newSink(zap.NewNop(), config.LogFileSinkConfig{File: path, RunDelimiterMode: "always"}, fs)
+		assert.Error(t, err)
+	})
+}
+
+func TestBlocker4(t *testing.T) {
+	fs := new(mockFS)
+	f := new(mockFile)
+
+	fs.On("Stat", "/tmp").Return(mockDirInfo{}, nil)
+	fs.On("OpenFile", "/tmp/audit.log", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(f, nil)
+	f.On("Write", mock.Anything).Return(0, nil).Once()
+
+	cfg := config.LogFileSinkConfig{File: "/tmp/audit.log", RunDelimiterMode: "always"}
+	sink, err := newSink(zap.NewNop(), cfg, fs)
+	assert.NoError(t, err)
+
+	f.On("Write", mock.Anything).Return(0, nil).Twice()
+	f.On("Sync").Return(nil).Twice()
+
+	events := []audit.Event{{}, {}}
+	err = sink.SendAudits(context.Background(), events)
+	assert.NoError(t, err)
+	f.AssertExpectations(t)
+}
+
+func TestBlocker4_SyncError(t *testing.T) {
+	fs := new(mockFS)
+	f := new(mockFile)
+
+	fs.On("Stat", "/tmp").Return(mockDirInfo{}, nil)
+	fs.On("OpenFile", "/tmp/audit.log", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(f, nil)
+	f.On("Write", mock.Anything).Return(0, nil).Once()
+
+	cfg := config.LogFileSinkConfig{File: "/tmp/audit.log", RunDelimiterMode: "always"}
+	sink, err := newSink(zap.NewNop(), cfg, fs)
+	assert.NoError(t, err)
+
+	f.On("Write", mock.Anything).Return(0, nil).Twice()
+	f.On("Sync").Return(errors.New("sync failed")).Twice()
+	f.On("Name").Return("audit.log")
+
+	events := []audit.Event{{}, {}}
+	err = sink.SendAudits(context.Background(), events)
+	assert.Error(t, err)
+	f.AssertExpectations(t)
+}
+
+func TestBlocker5(t *testing.T) {
+	tests := []struct {
+		mode        string
+		expectWrite bool
+		expectErr   bool
+	}{
+		{"always", true, false},
+		{"per_session", true, false},
+		{"on_restart", false, false},
+		{"never", false, false},
+		{"disabled", false, false},
+		{"", true, false},
+		{"invalid", false, true},
+	}
+
+	for _, tt := range tests {
+		t.Run(tt.mode, func(t *testing.T) {
+			fs := new(mockFS)
+			f := new(mockFile)
+			fs.On("Stat", "/tmp").Return(mockDirInfo{}, nil)
+			fs.On("OpenFile", "/tmp/audit.log", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(f, nil)
+
+			cfg := config.LogFileSinkConfig{File: "/tmp/audit.log", RunDelimiterMode: tt.mode}
+
+			if tt.expectErr {
+				f.On("Close").Return(nil).Maybe()
+			}
+
+			if tt.expectWrite {
+				f.On("Write", mock.MatchedBy(func(p []byte) bool {
+					return string(p) == "{\"type\":\"run_start\"}\n"
+				})).Return(0, nil).Once()
+			}
+
+			_, err := newSink(zap.NewNop(), cfg, fs)
+			if tt.expectErr {
+				assert.Error(t, err)
+			} else {
+				assert.NoError(t, err)
+			}
+			f.AssertExpectations(t)
+		})
+	}
+}
+
+func TestBlocker5_WriteFailure(t *testing.T) {
+	fs := new(mockFS)
+	f := new(mockFile)
+
+	fs.On("Stat", "/tmp").Return(mockDirInfo{}, nil)
+	fs.On("OpenFile", "/tmp/audit.log", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(f, nil)
+	f.On("Write", mock.Anything).Return(0, errors.New("write failed")).Once()
+	f.On("Close").Return(nil).Maybe()
+	f.On("Name").Return("audit.log").Maybe()
+
+	cfg := config.LogFileSinkConfig{File: "/tmp/audit.log", RunDelimiterMode: "always"}
+	_, err := newSink(zap.NewNop(), cfg, fs)
+	assert.Error(t, err)
+	assert.Contains(t, err.Error(), "write failed")
+	f.AssertExpectations(t)
+}
+
+func TestNewSink_NewFile(t *testing.T) {
+	fs := new(mockFS)
+	f := new(mockFile)
+
+	fs.On("Stat", "/tmp").Return(mockDirInfo{}, nil)
+	fs.On("OpenFile", "/tmp/audit.log", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(f, nil)
+	f.On("Write", mock.Anything).Return(0, nil)
+
+	cfg := config.LogFileSinkConfig{File: "/tmp/audit.log", RunDelimiterMode: "always"}
+	_, err := newSink(zap.NewNop(), cfg, fs)
+	assert.NoError(t, err)
+}
+
+func TestNewSink_ExistingFile(t *testing.T) {
+	fs := new(mockFS)
+	f := new(mockFile)
+
+	fs.On("Stat", "/tmp").Return(mockDirInfo{}, nil)
+	fs.On("OpenFile", "/tmp/audit.log", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(f, nil)
+	f.On("Write", mock.Anything).Return(0, nil)
+
+	cfg := config.LogFileSinkConfig{File: "/tmp/audit.log", RunDelimiterMode: "always"}
+	_, err := newSink(zap.NewNop(), cfg, fs)
+	assert.NoError(t, err)
+}
+
+func TestNewSink_DirNotExists(t *testing.T) {
+	fs := new(mockFS)
+	f := new(mockFile)
+
+	fs.On("Stat", "/tmp").Return(nil, os.ErrNotExist)
+	fs.On("MkdirAll", "/tmp", mock.Anything).Return(nil)
+	fs.On("OpenFile", "/tmp/audit.log", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(f, nil)
+	f.On("Write", mock.Anything).Return(0, nil)
+
+	cfg := config.LogFileSinkConfig{File: "/tmp/audit.log", RunDelimiterMode: "always"}
+	_, err := newSink(zap.NewNop(), cfg, fs)
+	assert.NoError(t, err)
+}
+
+func TestNewSink_Error(t *testing.T) {
+	fs := new(mockFS)
+
+	fs.On("Stat", "/tmp").Return(nil, os.ErrNotExist)
+	fs.On("MkdirAll", "/tmp", mock.Anything).Return(errors.New("mkdir failed"))
+
+	cfg := config.LogFileSinkConfig{File: "/tmp/audit.log"}
+	_, err := newSink(zap.NewNop(), cfg, fs)
+	assert.Error(t, err)
+}
+
+func TestSink_SendAudits(t *testing.T) {
+	fs := new(mockFS)
+	f := new(mockFile)
+
+	fs.On("Stat", "/tmp").Return(mockDirInfo{}, nil)
+	fs.On("OpenFile", "/tmp/audit.log", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(f, nil)
+	f.On("Write", mock.Anything).Return(0, nil)
+
+	cfg := config.LogFileSinkConfig{File: "/tmp/audit.log", RunDelimiterMode: "always"}
+	sink, err := newSink(zap.NewNop(), cfg, fs)
+	assert.NoError(t, err)
+
+	f.On("Write", mock.MatchedBy(func(p []byte) bool {
+		return string(p) == "{\"version\":\"0.1\",\"type\":\"flag\",\"action\":\"created\",\"metadata\":{},\"payload\":null,\"timestamp\":\"\"}\n"
+	})).Return(0, nil)
+	f.On("Sync").Return(nil)
+
+	events := []audit.Event{{Version: "0.1", Type: "flag", Action: "created"}}
+	err = sink.SendAudits(context.Background(), events)
+	assert.NoError(t, err)
+	f.AssertExpectations(t)
+}
